title: Per-script release bundle (PDF pack + model + licenses)
context: For sheets to be adopted by educators and OER repositories, they must be discoverable and downloadable as a coherent release bundle — not just files scattered in the repo. Each script needs a packaged release containing: all PDF variants (templates × accessibility variants × paper sizes), the formation model JSON, the SOURCES.md provenance file, and the full OFL + CC-BY license texts. The bundle should be automatable from CI so new script releases are not a manual process.
objective: Implement an automated release bundle builder that packages, per script, the full set of PDFs (all template/variant/paper-size combinations), the formation model, SOURCES.md, and license texts into a downloadable archive, and integrate it into CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Release bundle builder produces a per-script archive containing: all PDF variants (template × accessibility variant × paper size matrix), the schema-valid formation model JSON, SOURCES.md with provenance, and OFL + CC-BY-4.0 license texts.
Bundle is reproducible from CI given the same inputs (deterministic).
Bundle includes a manifest JSON listing every file, its role, and its license.
At least Latin (latin-009) and second script (script2-015) are bundled and released.
Release process documented in README or docs/ so new scripts can be bundled following the same process.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md section 9 M3 (discoverable release bundle per script)
output: Automated per-script release bundle builder integrated into CI, with at least Latin and second-script bundles produced — committed via PR with DCO sign-off.
